purpose: Turn Phase3CM train_reward into standardized feedback memory consumable by future searchers and schedulers.

phase3cn-feedback-memory-smoke.role: read Phase3CM reward outputs and write search feedback memory, arm scores, family scores, blocked families, and exploit-allowed families

hard_rules: holdout fields are read-only and excluded from arm_score
CEM/UCB feedback update is forbidden when clean_feedback_count < min_clean_feedback
proxy-high CM-negative family becomes rewardhack/freeze or block candidate
wrong-lag/high-corr families are blocked before exploit
exit_gate_for_phase3cn: BS/BT/BU emit unified candidate schema or can be normalized by schema adapter
CN feedback memory writes arm/family/block/exploit tables
searcher feedback smoke proves clean feedback shortage does not update CEM/UCB
holdout fields exist but are not read by optimizer
